creator: erik@tenku.dk
text:
Created attachment 239086
6.26.06 v2

Changes:

- remove git as a build dependency (this was a leftover from fetching vdt with ALLOW_NETWORKING_PACKAGES in `poudriere testport`)
- remove lib dependencies libxcb-icccm.so:x11/xcb-util-wm, libxcb-util.so:x11/xcb-util; add USE_XORG= xcb
- remove lib dependency libxml2.so:textproc/libxml2; add USE_GNOME= libxml2
